name: vibescope
description: Local-first observability for the vibe-coding era. Agent-agnostic: see what you and your coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini, Aider) actually did — sessions, tokens, cost, tools, pair time — plus an auto-drafted standup recap. Zero setup: it reads what's already on your machine.
author: Bishwajith Jha (https://github.com/ajitjha393)
